Portfolio holdings of William Von Mueffling - Cantillon Capital Management. William Von Mueffling - Cantillon Capital Management stock picks:. Stock Holdings page.
William Von Mueffling - Cantillon Capital Management i
Investment Philosophy:
Emphasis on businesses with sustainably above average return on equity, trading at a low price relative to their stream of earnings.

Von Mueffling is a Columbia Business School alumni and the advisory board chairman at the Heilbrunn Center for Graham & Dodd Investing.

Period: Q4 2025
Portfolio date: 31 Dec 2025
No. of stocks: 37
Portfolio value: $18,493,571,000
